headline: Assessing Darden Restaurants (DRI) Valuation As Shares Cool Despite Longer Term Gains
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Darden Restaurants (DRI) Darden Restaurants (DRI) has recently seen mixed share performance, with a 1 day decline, a flat past week, and negative returns over the month and past 3 months, while longer term returns remain positive. headline: Shares of restaurant and food related companies are trading higher after Iran signaled that the Strait of Hormuz will remain open for the duration of the ceasefire, easing concerns around energy costs and inflation risk.
